snippet.title: CG5 - Not Supposed To Love Me [Ode to JAX] (The Amazing Digital Circus Song Animation)
snippet.description:
STREAM "Not Supposed To Love Me" NOW ▶ https://cg5.lnk.to/NotSupposedToLoveMe

Song by @CG5
Animation by @CodaAnim
Guitars by @FamilyJules7X

Follow CG5's social media:
Twitter ▶ http://twitter.com/cg5beats
Twitch ▶ https://www.twitch.tv/cg5music
Spotify ▶ https://sptfy.com/cg5_
Instagram ▶ http://www.instagram.com/cg5beats/

Follow @cg5live105, @cg5covers107, & @cg5instrumentals461
Discord Server ▶ https://discord.gg/CG5

LYRICS:

I’ve abandoned hope,
Looking for something that was real.
I’ll try not to think about it,
I don’t want to feel.
Cuz it’s all just too much to carry.
It’s all much too wrong.
I’ve lived in levity so long.

I'm forever haunted by the choices that I made.
A weight beyond imagining that never seems to fade.
For every scar I've left behind comes back to me in waves.
I run from love, I run away.

Cuz despite it all, I’m fine,
Despite the pain we shared.
I told you stories, told you lies.
I never shoulda dared open the door.
The tears of the past mean nothing anymore.
And you’re not supposed to miss me.

To hell with everyone,
Who ever swore they’d help me,
Don’t you tell me what I want.
Or what I need, cuz I’m the bigger man.
I’m never looking back,
And you won’t see me again.
Cuz you’re not supposed to love me.

Family fell apart, made me feel like I was weak.
So I cut them from my life, my feelings buried far beneath.
No, I do not deserve to be forgiven of my sins.
Shut up and leave me in ruins.

Cuz despite it all, I’m fine,
Despite the pain we shared.
I told you stories, told you lies.
I never shoulda dared open the door.
The tears of the past mean nothing anymore.
And you’re not supposed to miss me.

To hell with everyone,
Who ever swore they’d help me,
Don’t you tell me what I want.
Or what I need, cuz I’m the bigger man.
I’m never looking back,
And you won’t see me again.
Cuz you’re not supposed to love me.

You’re making this so hard.
Won’t let me disappear.
Somehow you see me in the dark.
Too long I lived in fear, now it’s too late.
No I don’t want to go,
But I chose my own fate,
I hate you, but you’ll still miss me.

So thank you everyone,
Whoever tried to help me.
After all that’s said and done,
You held me close, and made me understand.
But I’ll never come back,
And you won’t see me again.
Cuz you’re not supposed to love me.
No!
You’re not supposed to love me.
No!
You’re not supposed to love me.

I’ve abandoned hope,
Looking for something that was real.
I’ll try not to think about it,
I don’t want to feel.
Cuz it’s all just too much to carry.
It’s all much too wrong.
I’ve lived in levity so long.

I'm forever haunted by the choices that I made.
A weight beyond imagining that never seems to fade.
For every scar I've left behind comes back to me in waves.
I run from love, I run away.

Cuz despite it all, I’m fine,
Despite the pain we shared.
I told you stories, told you lies.
I never shoulda dared open the door.
The tears of the past mean nothing anymore.
And you’re not supposed to miss me.

To hell with everyone,
Who ever swore they’d help me,
Don’t you tell me what I want.
Or what I need, cuz I’m the bigger man.
I’m never looking back,
And you won’t see me again.
Cuz you’re not supposed to love me.

Family fell apart, made me feel like I was weak.
So I cut them from my life, my feelings buried far beneath.
No, I do not deserve to be forgiven of my sins.
Shut up and leave me in ruins.

Cuz despite it all, I’m fine,
Despite the pain we shared.
I told you stories, told you lies.
I never shoulda dared open the door.
The tears of the past mean nothing anymore.
And you’re not supposed to miss me.

To hell with everyone,
Who ever swore they’d help me,
Don’t you tell me what I want.
Or what I need, cuz I’m the bigger man.
I’m never looking back,
And you won’t see me again.
Cuz you’re not supposed to love me.

You’re making this so hard.
Won’t let me disappear.
Somehow you see me in the dark.
Too long I lived in fear, now it’s too late.
No I don’t want to go,
But I chose my own fate,
I hate you, but you’ll still miss me.

So thank you everyone,
Whoever tried to help me.
After all that’s said and done,
You held me close, and made me understand.
But I’ll never come back,
And you won’t see me again.
Cuz you’re not supposed to love me.
No!
You’re not supposed to love me.
No!
You’re not supposed to love me.

snippet.title: NAZMA'N DI PAALKI (Official Video) | Satinder Sartaaj | Beat Minister | Hasanpreet Kaur
snippet.description:
Presenting “Naazman Di Paalki” — Palanquin of the Poems, the first soulful song from the album “The Perfumed Moments.”

A poetic and musical journey beautifully written, composed, and sung by Satinder Sartaaj, with music by Beat Minister. This song brings together elegance, emotions, poetry, and cinematic visuals in a graceful way.

Listen, feel, and celebrate the fragrance of words with Naazman Di Paalki.

Song Credits
Song: Naazman Di Paalki (Palanquin of the Poems)
Album: The Perfumed Moments
Lyrics / Composer / Singer: Satinder Sartaaj
Featuring : Hasanpreet Kaur
Music: Beat Minister
Mix / Master: Sameer Charegaonkar
Director: Sanddeep Sharma
Editor: Gurmeet Dhaliwal
Project By: Harmandeep Singh
YouTube Management: Pixilar Studios

Video Credits
DOP: Honey Cam
Drone: Bheem
Production: Salted Caramel
Choreography: Prince Bhangra & Nazm Kaur (Bhangra Queens)
Makeup: Honey Kalsi
Costumes: Rajat Manchanda
Jewellery: Jugni Traditionals
DI Colorist: Sushi Flix
VFX: Pixa FX Studio

NAZMA’N DI PAALKI ਨਜ਼ਮਾਂ ਦੀ ਪਾਲਕੀ {The Palanquin of Poems}


ਅਸੀਂ ਦਿਲ ਦਾ ਸੁਣਾਈਏ ਦੱਸੋ ਹਾਲ ਕੀ !
ਚੁੱਕੀ ਹਰਫ਼ਾਂ ਨੇ ਨਜ਼ਮਾਂ ਦੀ ਪਾਲਕੀ ;
ਇਸ਼ਕੇ ਦੇ ਪਿੰਡ ‘ਚੋਂ ,
ਪਾਣੀ ਵਾਰਿਆ, ਸੁਣੀਂ ਪਿਆਰਿਆ,
ਨੈਣਾਂ ਨੇ ਰਾਹਾਂ ਦਾ ਕਰਜ਼ਾ ਉਤਾਰਿਆ ।

How shall I tell the tale of my heart ?
The words have lifted the Palanquin of Poems from the village of Love.
Listen beloved ; auspicious water is offered as custom of your arrival !
My eyes repaid their debt to the waiting roads by beholding you.



ਜਦੋਂ ਛਿੜਿਆ ਮੁਹੱਬਤਾਂ ਦਾ ਗੀਤ ਜੀ !
ਵਰ੍ਹੀ ਬੱਦਲਾਂ ਚੋਂ ਰੱਜ-ਰੱਜ ਪੀ੍ਤ ਜੀ ;
ਧੁੱਪ ਗੋਰੀ ਭਿੱਜ ਗਈ ,
ਰਹੀ ਸੰਗਦੀ, ਓਹਲ੍ਹੇ ਮੰਗਦੀ,
ਚੁੰਨੀ ਦਿੱਤੀ ਅੰਬਰਾਂ ਗੁਲਾਬੀ ਰੰਗ ਦੀ।
When the song of love began to play,
The love rained from the clouds of reminiscence;
Fair sunlight itself was drenched,
Growing shy and seeking a veil to hide behind;
The heavens gifted her a rose-tinted scarf !



ਅਸੀ ਸੱਦਿਆ ਨੀ ਯਾਦਾਂ ਦੇ ਸ਼ਰੀਕ ਨੂੰ !
ਤਾਂ ਵੀ ਪਹੁੰਚ ਗਿਆ ਲਾਜ਼ਮੀ ਤਰੀਕ ਨੂੰ ;
ਚੇਤੇ ਆਏ ਨਾਲ ਜੀ !
ਗੱਲਾਂ ਖੋਲ੍ਹੀਆਂ ਆਂ, ਸ਼ਰਾਬਾਂ ਡੋਲ੍ਹੀਆਂ,
ਚੰਦਰੇ ਖ਼ਿਆਲ ਤੇਰੇ ਪਾਉਣ ਬੋਲੀਆਂ ।

I never summoned the companion of memories,
Yet he arrived unfailingly, right on time.
Remembrances came along with him;
Conversations unfolded, goblets overflowed,
& restless thoughts began singing about you !!

ਅੱਜ ਸੱਧਰਾਂ ਨੇ ਮੁੱਖੜਾ ਛੁਪਾ ਲਿਆ !
ਉਹਨਾਂ ਪਿਛਲੇ ਵਿਹੜੇ ‘ਚ ਬਹਿ ਕੇ ਗਾ ਲਿਆ ;
ਗਾਣਾ ਸਰਤਾਜ ਦਾ !
ਕੰਧ ਕੱਚ ਦੀ, ਕਿੰਝ ਬਚਦੀ,
ਰੀਝ ਬਾਹੋਂ ਫੜ ਅੱਗੇ ਹੋ-ਹੋ ਨੱਚਦੀ ।

Today, my longings hid their faces,
Sitting in the backyard & indulged in singing of a Sartaaj’s song .
How could a wall of glass remain unbroken ?
Desire seized me by the arm
& danced ahead in ecstasy .

ਸਾਡੀ ਅੱਲ੍ੜਾਂ ਦੀ ਰਾਤ ਵੇ ਕੁਆਰਿਆ !
ਬਹੁਤਾ ਲਿਸ਼ਕੀਂ ਨਾ ਅੰਬਰਾਂ ‘ਤੇ ਤਾਰਿਆ ; ਗੱਲ ਬੜੇ ਰਾਜ਼ ਦੀ !
ਪੁੱਛੀਂ ਰੱਬ ਨੂੰ, ਇਹ ਸਬੱਬ ਨੂੰ,
ਏਸੇ ਤਰਾ੍ਂ ਹੁੰਦਾ ਕੀ ਪਿਆਰ ਸਭ ਨੂੰ !

O bachelor star, this is the night of youthful hearts ;
Shine not too brightly across the sky.
It is a matter wrapped in mystery;
Ask the Creator, ask the reason behind it:
Does love arrive this way for everyone ?



Stay Connected with  @Satinder-Sartaaj  
Instagram: https://instagram.com/SatinderSartaaj
Twitter: https://twitter.com/SufiSartaaj 
Facebook: https://facebook.com/SatinderSartaaj 
TikTok: https://tiktok.com/@satindersartaaj
Snapchat: https://snapchat.com/add/SatinderSartaaj 

 #NaazmanDiPaalki #SatinderSartaaj #ThePerfumedMoments

snippet.title: Måneskin - Beggin' (Testo/(Lyrics)
snippet.description:
Måneskin - Beggin' (Testo/(Lyrics)

Follow Måneskin:
https://www.instagram.com/maneskinofficial
https://www.facebook.com/maneskinofficial
https://twitter.com/thisismaneskin

Lyrics:

[Intro]
Put your lovin' hand out, baby
'Cause I'm beggin'

[Chorus]
I'm beggin', beggin' you
So put your lovin' hand out, baby
I'm beggin', beggin' you
So put your loving hand out, darlin'

[Verse 1]
Ridin' high when I was king
I played it hard and fast, 'cause I had everything
I walked away, you warned me then
But easy come and easy go and it would end

[Verse 2]
So anytime I bleed, you let me go
Yah, anytime I feed, you get me, no
Anytime I seek, you let me know
But I plant and seed, just let me go
I'm on my knees when I'm beggin'
'Cause I don't wanna lose you
Hey, yeah, ra-ta-ta-ta!

[Chorus]
'Cause I'm beggin', beggin' you
Uh, put your lovin' hand out, baby
I'm beggin', beggin' you, ah
And put your lovin' hand out, darlin'

[Verse 3]
I need you to understand
Tried so hard to be your man
The kind of man you want in the end
Only then can I begin to live again

[Verse 4]
An empty shell, I used to be
The shadow of my life was hangin' over me
A broken man that I don't know
Won't even stand the devil's dance to win my soul

[Verse 5]
What we doin'? What we chasin'?
Why the bottom? Why the basement?
Why we got good shit, don't embrace it?
Why the feel for the need to replace me?
You're the wrong way track from the good
I wanna paint a picture tellin' where we could be at
Like a heart in the best way should
You can give it away, you had it and you took the pay
But I keep walkin' on, keep openin' doors
Keep hopin' for, now the door is yours
Keep also home
'Cause I don't wanna live in a broken home, girl, I'm beggin'

[Chorus]
Mmm, yeah, yeah, I'm beggin', beggin' you
So put your lovin' hand out, baby
I'm beggin', beggin' you
So put your lovin' hand out, darlin'

[Bridge]
I'm fightin' hard to hold my own
Just can't make it all alone
I'm holdin' on, I can't fall back
I'm just a calm, 'bout to fade to black

[Chorus]
I'm beggin', beggin' you
Put your lovin' hand out, baby
I'm beggin', beggin' you
So put your lovin' hand out, darlin'
I'm beggin', beggin' you
So put your lovin' hand out, baby
I'm beggin', beggin' you
So put your lovin' hand out, darlin'

[Outro]
I'm beggin', beggin' you
So put your lovin' hand out, baby
I'm beggin', beggin' you
So put your lovin' hand out

snippet.title: Everything Rockstar Just Revealed About GTA 6
snippet.description:
GTA 6 launches November 19, 2026 — here is everything Rockstar has confirmed so far. This is the complete breakdown: both official trailers analyzed, all 8 confirmed characters, all 6 map regions of Leonida, the official release date, pricing details, and what Rockstar still has to reveal before launch day.

GTA 6 (Grand Theft Auto VI / GTA VI) is shaping up to be the most ambitious open-world game ever made. In this video, I cover the full development history from Rockstar's first hints to the second official trailer, break down every confirmed character including protagonists Jason and Lucia, map every known region across the state of Leonida including Vice City, and walk through the official release date and pricing structure. I also look at what GTA 6 gameplay trailers and leaked footage have revealed, and what to expect from Rockstar before the November 19 launch.

Whether you're catching up on GTA 6 news, want a GTA 6 trailer breakdown, or need a complete GTA 6 character guide before release — this is the one video to watch.

‘Alastor’ and ‘Hazbin Hotel’ belong to Vivienne Medrano

This fan animation is non-canon and is not officially affiliated with Spindlehorse Productions.

LYRICS-----------

Dearly beloved,
For your entertainment, it's my pleasure to introduce to you Hell’s latest arrival;
The equal-opportunity killer, Alastor!

Hello, it’s nice to meet you!
Can you tell me where I am?
I don’t know how I got here
But I think I’m starting to understand.
I don’t belong among the angels
And baby, that’s just fine with me.
The things I did up there were high school
But now I’m going for my degree

Hey
Sorry, but you just got in my way
I promise, honey, I can feel your pain
And maybe I enjoy just a little bit
Does that make me insane?
Haven’t been the same since I expired
Doesn’t mean that I plan to retire
And now I have the power to bathe all of you in entertaining fire!

CHORUS -

Wait a minute, do I know you?
Weren’t you an old pal of mine?
Departed from us far too early
But now we’re meeting a second time.
We used to have such fun together
And maybe you have what I need
But first, I have one tiny question
Tell me, do you demons bleed?

CHORUS -

Hey
Sorry, but you just got in my way
I promise, honey, I can feel your pain
And maybe I enjoy just a little bit
Does that make me insane?
Haven’t been the same since I expired
Doesn’t mean that I plan to retire
And now I have the power to bathe all of you in entertaining fire!

Hey
Sorry, but you just got in my way
I promise, honey, I can feel your pain
And maybe I enjoy just a little bit
Does that make me insane?

END-----------

HELLO DDR's (Dedicated Description Readers)
What a crazy journey this has been... It's moments like this that put life into perspective! When we wrote this song 5 years ago, Nate had just gotten out of the Navy, I had just started shifting gears from Impressions to original music, and we were all trying to figure out how to make a living doing what we love: making music and videos.

Since then, my brother and I have written multiple charting records, been featured in Fortnite, NCIS, Poppy Playtime, Billie Bust Up, Garten of Ban Ban, and America's Got Talent (twice)! I became a pilot and bought my own airplane, Claire became a producer for Rob Riggle's podcast "Riggle's Picks", and Nate (is very private, but his life has also changed in so many ways). This song helped define the business that we run today and we couldn't be more grateful! So, to everyone who made this possible, THANK YOU!!!
